S

SampleAttendeesActivity - Class in com.icarus.events
Activity that allows an organizer to randomly sample attendees from the event entrants subcollection.
SampleAttendeesActivity() - Constructor for class com.icarus.events.SampleAttendeesActivity
 
selectAll() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OraganizerEntrantViewListArrayAdapter
Selects all entrants currently contained in the adapter and refreshes the list so all checkboxes appear checked.

Dispatches the notification to all specified recipients.

Sends a push notification to a specific target device using the FCM HTTP v1 API.

Sets the unique document ID for this notification.

Sets the reference for the image of the event.

Sets the profile image URL of the user

Sets whether the user is an admin

Sets the location of the event.

Sets the category or type of the notification.
